decision-tree.root-question: Has the new model passed all four phase gates with named approvers?

branch.conclusion: Proceed to production canary using the recorded rollback plan.

branch.question: Which phase is missing or blocked?

branch.conclusion: Block promotion; run eval diff before any routing change.
Block canary; complete gateway/observability wiring first.
Reject without a named approver and signed gate memo.

example.p: Proceed to production canary using the recorded rollback plan.
